scripts.build: tsup src/app/server.ts src/app/search-worker.ts src/app/analytics-worker.ts src/app/booking-expiry-worker.ts src/app/payment-retry-worker.ts src/app/payment-repair-worker.ts src/app/payout-release-worker.ts --format esm --platform node --target node22 --out-dir dist --clean
scripts.test: tsx src/app/configuration/bootstrap/container.test.ts && tsx src/app/configuration/middlewares/jwt-middleware.test.ts && tsx src/app/features/auth/authorization.test.ts && tsx src/app/features/auth/auth.service.test.ts && tsx src/app/features/security/content-sanitization.service.test.ts && tsx src/app/features/postings/postings.service.test.ts
